name: HẺM ĂN VẶT
description: HẺM ĂN VẶT (meaning 'Snack Alley') is a Vietnamese street food and snack restaurant located in Sunshine North, Melbourne. The restaurant brings the vibrant flavours of Vietnamese street food culture to the local community, serving a range of traditional Vietnamese snacks, casual dishes, and authentic street food favourites inspired by the laneways of Vietnam.
address: 67 Berkshire Rd, Sunshine North VIC 3020, Australia
logo_note: No logo found online. The business has very limited web presence and no logo image was discoverable via Google, Facebook, Instagram, or their Uber Eats listing.
